arts.ttl: ‘I’ve learned so much’ - Yamal lifts lid on playing under Flick at Barca
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has offered some insight into what it’s like to play for Hansi Flick at Barcelona and says he’s learned an awful lot from the Barcelona boss already. Yamal also spoke about his form and says his focus is on enjoying himself out on the pitch and trying to entertain the fans.

arts.ttl: Barcelona send message to Neymar over summer return
arts.sum: The brass at La Liga giants Barcelona have sent a message the way of Neymar Jr, over the possibility of returning to the club. That’s according to Diario Sport, who…

arts.ttl: Barca ‘recovering almost everything they invested’ in Vitor Roque
arts.sum: Vitor Roque admitted openly he had a tough time at Barcelona, but Cury still thinks there’s a lot more to come from the youngster and he could even return to Europe in the future. Vitor Roque’s agent Andre Cury has claimed Barcelona will effectively get their money back after selling the Brazilian youngster to Palmeiras.

arts.ttl: Barcelona youngster trains with Hansi Flick’s squad ahead of Benfica
arts.sum: An up-and-coming member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona was spotted in training alongside Hansi Flick’s star-studded squad on Monday. That’s according to Diario Sport, who point…

arts.ttl: Barcelona will not return to the Camp Nou this season
arts.sum: An update on the ongoing renovations at the home of La Liga giants Barcelona has on Monday been forthcoming online. And the news will no doubt come as a blow…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star emerges as doubt to face Benfica after missing training
arts.sum: A member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has seen his status for the club’s upcoming meeting with Benfica thrown into doubt. The player in question? Gavi.…

arts.ttl: Neymar to Barcelona: Blockbuster return 'feasible' says agent
arts.sum: Neymar still harbours hopes of a triumphant return to Barcelona and the transfer is 'feasible,' according to the man who brokered his initial move to Catalunya. It has been claimed that Neymar dreams of returning to Barcelona, a club many feel (and perhaps he himself) he left too soon when joined PSG for a world-record €222 million in 2017.

arts.ttl: Barcelona star sits 2nd in ground duels won in Europe’s top-5 leagues
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal sits high on the list of players with the most ground duels won in Europe’s top-5 leagues across the season to date. That’s according to statisticians…
